content.en:
These masters who surpassed the Ten Realms were silent for a while, and it was the primordial-level ancestors who broke the silence.

"Everyone, you should have sensed the change in the rules of the Origin Realm Sea!"

The Primordial Ancestor spoke.

The Ten Elements Ancestor nodded: "Naturally, I know, otherwise, we wouldn't all be standing here." We didn't expect that one day we would be rejected by the Origin Realm Sea!"

Among these people, the most depressed is the Black Emperor Ancestor.

"Hey, it's not been long since I've surpassed the Ten Realms, and now I'm going to be rejected by the Origin Realm Sea. The Origin Realm Sea is my home, and I won't even be able to go back to it soon. The Black Emperor Ancestor said helplessly.

At this time, the Realm Ancestor said: "It's not a big deal, we can open a dojo at the end of the Origin Realm Sea near the Origin Realm Sea, but we can't enter the Origin Realm Sea, and anything else can be known at the first time." "

The Selfless True Ancestor said: "But if there is any danger at the end of the realm, sometimes the Origin Realm Sea is a natural protective cover, but now we can't enter the Origin Realm Sea, if we really encounter danger, we can only sit and wait." "

"Dangerous?" the Black Emperor Ancestor asked curiously, "We have all surpassed the Ten Realm-level controllers, and there is no road on it, could it be that there are any more powerful existences than us?"

The Selfless True Ancestor smiled and said, "It's just that there is no road to the Origin Realm Sea, it doesn't mean that there is no road to the end of the realm." The end of the world is so big, and we have all encountered it comparable to our lives. It's just that the Black Emperor Ancestor has only broken through, and you haven't explored the end of the realm yet, so you don't know much. In short, there are more than one or two dangers that could bring us down. "

The Black Emperor Ancestor secretly remembered.

"How could the Origin Realm Sea suddenly change its rules and reject us?" the Ten Elements Ancestor said curiously.

There was no warning before, and suddenly it became like this.

"I don't know anything!"

Black Emperor Ancestor Dao.

The others also shook their heads one by one, not knowing why.

After all, this has never happened, this is the first time it has been discovered.

They only knew that some worlds or voids would repel the strong, but the Origin Realm Sea was so huge that such a thing would happen.

At this time, the Primordial Ancestor said a guess, "I'm afraid this matter really has something to do with the Black Emperor Ancestor." "

"What, what does this matter have to do with me?" the Black Emperor Ancestor was taken aback, "I don't carry this pot." "

The Primordial Ancestor continued, "The Black Emperor Ancestor has created the method of breaking through the shackles and chains, and this path has made the rules of the Origin Realm Sea a little more perfect. And the existence of those of us who have surpassed the Ten Realms level controllers can easily break the shackles and chains, which is equivalent to provoking the rules of the Origin Realm Sea again and again, and overriding the rules, which makes the Origin Realm Sea begin to self-regulate and change, and it can even be said to be a kind of perfection. And now, the perfection of the Origin Realm Sea is almost complete, and the way to perfect it is to expel those of us who have transcended the Ten Realms. It's like some ordinary worlds, after the rules are perfected, people who go beyond the rules of the world are not allowed to stay, and they are expelled one after another. "

"There is some truth in the analysis of the primitive ancestors. Jiezu nodded.

Subsequently, they discussed for a long time, trying to come up with a way not to leave the Origin Realm Sea, but in the end, they couldn't do so.

Although they surpassed the Ten Realm-level controllers, compared to the entire Origin Realm Sea, they still couldn't help the Origin Realm Sea.

"I have no choice but to move the dojo!"

Ten Xingzu sighed.

"Also, don't make a big deal about it, otherwise it will cause a lot of turmoil. After all, once we don't have our deterrence, I'm afraid there will be a lot of strife among the Eternal Controllers!"

"Well, I propose to only tell my own personal disciples or relatives to know!"

Then they discussed it again, and after a while, they left one by one.

......

Wanyuan Mountain.

Ye Tian received a summons from the Ten Elements Ancestor and came over as soon as possible.

Soon, he found that Senior Brother Jiang You, Second Senior Brother Gu Mo, Third Senior Brother Hei Yu, and Fourth Senior Sister Xue Nu had also come here to meet Shizun together.

"I've seen Shizun!"

Several people said respectfully.

The Ten Elements Ancestor looked at the five people and said solemnly: "I have something to announce, and it is a very important thing. "

The five of them listened solemnly and with their ears pricked up.

Ten Elements Ancestor said: "I am going to move the dojo and move Wanyuan Mountain to the end of the realm. Moreover, in the future, Wanyuan Mountain will not be able to enter and exit the Origin Realm Sea freely, and after leaving Wanyuan Mountain, he will tear through the barriers of the Origin Realm Sea and enter the Origin Realm Sea. "

"Master, has something happened to the Origin Realm Sea?" Ye Tian asked in surprise.

The Ten Elements Ancestor nodded slightly: "Yes, there is indeed something wrong with the Origin Realm Sea, it is about to exclude the existence above the Ten Realms level, so I, the Primordial Ancestor, and they will not be able to continue to stay in the Origin Realm Sea, they must leave the Origin Realm Sea! Moreover, we will never be able to enter the Origin Realm Sea again, unless one day we can ignore the rules of the Origin Realm Sea." "

"How so?"

The Black Rotten Ruler was shocked.

Immediately, the Ten Elements Ancestor said the possible reason for its existence, that is, the set of speculations of the Primitive Ancestor.

As for whether this is the case, then there is no need to speculate, because it has already happened and cannot be changed.

"Master, if you say that, in the future, the Origin Realm Sea will be honored by the Ten Realm-level controllers?" said the Black Decay Controller in surprise.

"That's true!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor nodded.

Immediately, the Ten Elements Ancestor advised: "In the future, this vein will be guarded by you, especially Hei Yu and Ye Tian, your strength is the strongest, so don't let this vein be bullied, whoever dares to offend my vein, then bully back, we don't cause trouble, but we are not afraid of things." "

"Yes, Master!"

Ye Tian and the other five people responded one after another.

"Don't spread the word about it, you just know it. The Ten Elements Ancestor commanded.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian and the others nodded.

"In the future, if you have something, you can still come to Wanyuan Mountain to find a teacher. "

The Ten Elements Ancestor gave a few more words, and then prepared to move Wanyuan Mountain.

On Wanyuan Mountain, those official disciples were moved out one by one, and then briefly talked about the relocation, but as for the reason, they didn't say.

Bang!!!!

The Ten Elements Ancestor dragged Wanyuan Mountain, tore through the barrier of the Origin Realm Sea, and came to the end of the realm, and immediately stopped at a treasure place at the end of the realm.

And the other great beings who had surpassed the Ten Realms-level masters had also moved their own dojos, found a treasure place at the end of the realm, and occupied it as their own dojo place.

This matter only caused a sensation at the top of the Origin Realm Sea, but many Eternal Masters only knew that the Great Beings had relocated the Dojo, and they didn't know what the reason was, and only a very small number of Eternal Masters knew the reason, but they didn't publicize it.

In this way, time passed slowly, and the Eternal Controller gradually accepted this fact, and without thinking much about it, it seemed that the Origin Realm Sea was still stable.

However, on this day, there were still some changes in the Origin Realm Sea.
